initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT cs.cs_order_number) AS order_count,
    SUM(cs.cs_ext_ship_cost) AS total_ship_cost,
    SUM(cs.cs_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM catalog_sales cs
JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
JOIN customer_address ca ON cs.cs_ship_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN call_center cc ON cs.cs_call_center_sk = cc.cc_call_center_sk
WHERE d.d_date BETWEEN '2002-02-01' AND '2002-04-02'
  AND ca.ca_state = 'GA'
  AND cc.cc_county = 'Williamson County'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 
      FROM catalog_sales cs2 
      WHERE cs2.cs_order_number = cs.cs_order_number 
        AND cs2.cs_warehouse_sk <> cs.cs_warehouse_sk
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 
      FROM catalog_returns cr 
      WHERE cr.cr_order_number = cs.cs_order_number
  )
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY order_count ASC
LIMIT 100;
initial_candidates.exec_error:
Binder Error: GROUP BY clause cannot contain aggregates!

LINE 2:     COUNT(DISTINCT cs.cs_order_number) AS order_count,
            ^
